creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
This seems ok to me, I cc'ed a few folks who have hacked on daemon(8) recently.  It would be useful to have a patch in the form of git format-patch's output (or you can submit the patch on github), so that author metadata etc. is filled out correctly.

It appears that -C has been taken for a different purpose in commit 7618c9e1637caea97723ff8accd60f3dc436b044, so this can't be applied as-is.
